headline: Ulta Beauty surges on earnings beat, upbeat guidance
summary: Investing.com -- Ulta Beauty Inc. (NASDAQ:ULTA) reported first-quarter results that exceeded Wall Street expectations, with adjusted earnings per share of $7.74 beating the analyst consensus of $6.87 by $0.87. Revenue reached $3.16 billion, topping the estimate of $3.11 billion and marking an 11.1% increase from $2.85 billion in the year-ago period. Shares jumped over 5% in after-hours trading Tuesday.
